tagline: Transform Your Body & Mind with Expert Yoga Training in Asansol

contact.address: Mohishila Colony Rd, Mohishila Colony, Asansol, West Bengal 713303

hero.title: Stop Surviving. Start Thriving.
hero.subtitle: Join Asansol's most loved yoga center and experience the transformation hundreds of students already have — stronger body, calmer mind, and real results in 30 days.

instructor.name: Soma Ma'am
instructor.title: Lead Yoga Instructor & Wellness Coach
instructor.certifications: Certified Hatha Yoga Instructor | Meditation Guide | Pranayama Specialist
instructor.story: Soma Ma'am began her yoga journey after struggling with chronic stress and low energy. After transforming her own life through dedicated practice, she founded ATMIK Yoga & Fitness with one mission — to make holistic wellness accessible to everyone in Asansol. Her warm, patient teaching style has helped 70+ students achieve results they never thought possible.

programs.name: Beginner Yoga
programs.tagline: Your first step to a new you
programs.description: Perfect for those who have never done yoga before. We start slow, build your foundation, and help you fall in love with the practice — all at your own pace.
programs.outcome: Feel confident and comfortable in your body within 30 days

programs.name: Weight Loss Yoga
programs.tagline: Burn fat, build strength, feel light
programs.description: A dynamic blend of flow yoga, core strengthening, and metabolism-boosting poses designed specifically to help you lose weight — without harsh diets or exhausting workouts.
programs.forWhom: Anyone wanting to lose weight naturally and sustainably
benefits: Reduce belly fat with targeted poses
programs.outcome: Noticeable body changes within 6 weeks of consistent practice

programs.name: Meditation & Pranayama
programs.tagline: Quiet the noise. Find your peace.
programs.description: A deeply calming practice focused on breath control, mindfulness, and inner stillness. Ideal for anyone dealing with stress, anxiety, or sleep issues.
programs.forWhom: Stressed professionals, anxiety sufferers, sleep-deprived individuals
programs.outcome: Measurable reduction in stress and better sleep within 2 weeks

programs.name: Flexibility & Mobility
programs.description: Targeted stretching and mobility work to release tight muscles, improve range of motion, and prevent injury — whether you sit at a desk all day or lead an active life.
programs.forWhom: Desk workers, seniors, athletes, chronic pain sufferers
benefits: Relieve back, neck, and shoulder pain
programs.outcome: Significant improvement in flexibility and pain reduction in 3 weeks

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.review: I had tried everything — gym, diets, everything failed. Soma Ma'am's weight loss yoga changed my life. I lost 8 kilos in 3 months and actually enjoyed the process. The environment here is so peaceful and positive.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Gupta
testimonials.review: I had severe back pain from sitting at my desk all day. After just 6 weeks at ATMIK Yoga, the pain is completely gone. Soma Ma'am is incredibly knowledgeable and her guidance is very personalized.

testimonials.name: Ananya Dey
testimonials.review: I suffered from insomnia and anxiety for years. The Meditation and Pranayama classes at ATMIK are magical. I sleep like a baby now and feel so much calmer. This place is truly a blessing.

testimonials.name: Meena Agarwal
testimonials.review: At 52, I thought my body couldn't change. But ATMIK Yoga proved me completely wrong. Soma Ma'am's beginner classes are so welcoming and I feel 20 years younger now. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Suresh Mondal
testimonials.result: Stress-free for the first time in years
testimonials.review: My job stress was destroying me. A friend recommended ATMIK and I'm forever grateful. The pranayama techniques I learned here have completely transformed how I handle pressure. Best investment I've made.

leadMagnet.title: Free 7-Day Morning Yoga Routine
leadMagnet.subtitle: Start your transformation TODAY — for free
leadMagnet.description: Get our exclusive beginner-friendly 7-day morning yoga routine designed by Soma Ma'am. Perfect for busy people who want real results in just 20 minutes a day.
benefits: Works even if you're a complete beginner
